manifest.author: Dominik Pieper
manifest.name: ReadItLater
manifest.description: Save online content to your Vault, utilize embedded template engine and organize your reading list to your needs. Preserve the web with ReadItLater.

manifest.name: Homework Manager
manifest.description: Keeps track of homework through a to-do list.

manifest.name: Account Linker
manifest.description: Plugin for describing external service accounts in the front matter

manifest.author: Diego Eis
manifest.name: Conditional Properties
manifest.description: Automate your frontmatter with smart IF/THEN rules. Set properties, modify titles, and keep your vault organized—automatically.

manifest.author: Lutu-gl
manifest.name: Minimal Quiz
manifest.description: Start a quick Markdown-based quiz on your current note. Simple, straightforward, and fully integrated — similar to flashcards in Anki or Quizlet!

manifest.author: No3371
manifest.name: Regex Pipeline
manifest.description: Allows users setup custom regex rules to automatically format notes.

manifest.author: Neo Zhang
manifest.name: You and Your Research

manifest.author: Andrea Alberti
manifest.name: BibDesk Integration
manifest.description: Import BibTex citations into your notes and open PDF documents linked in a BibDesk library.

manifest.name: Move Files

manifest.description: Sync your Hardcover library to your notes.

manifest.name: Multilingual

manifest.author: dmo-code
manifest.name: My Typewriter Line
manifest.description: Keep the active line in focus with customizable top and bottom scroll padding for typewriter-like editing.

manifest.name: Quick Cards
manifest.description: cardify your files

manifest.name: oblogger
manifest.description: tagger explorer and frontmatter logger

manifest.name: Editor Autofocus
manifest.description: Autofocus the editor when opening a new file.

manifest.name: Clojure Plugin Host
manifest.description: A Clojure plugin host, allowing the creation of simple Clojure-based plugins right inside the editor.

manifest.author: shumadrid
manifest.name: Copy Path

manifest.author: @kepano
manifest.name: Minimal Theme Settings
manifest.description: Change the colors, fonts and features of Minimal Theme.

manifest.author: Ara Adkins

manifest.author: Terrastruct
manifest.name: D2
manifest.description: The official D2 plugin for Obsidian. D2 is a modern diagram scripting language that turns text to diagrams.

manifest.author: kurakart
manifest.name: Garble Text

manifest.author: Smort
manifest.name: Smort

manifest.author: dangehub
manifest.name: Blur Mode
manifest.description: Blur anything you want to keep your privacy.

manifest.author: Edward Cui
manifest.name: Quiz Generator
manifest.description: Generate interactive flashcards from your notes using models from OpenAI (ChatGPT), Google (Gemini), Ollama (local LLMs), and more. Or manually create your own to use with the quiz UI.

manifest.author: leo
manifest.name: Content Cards
manifest.description: Insert content cards in Markdown, such as timeline, highlightblock, target card, book information card, music information card, movie information card, photoes ablum, business card, content subfield, countdown, SWOT, BCG.

manifest.author: PJ Eby
manifest.name: Pane Relief
manifest.description: Per-tab history, hotkeys for pane/tab movement, navigation, sliding workspace, and more

manifest.author: mdklab
manifest.name: Note Favicon
manifest.description: Extracts a URL from the frontmatter of notes and displays an associated favicon image next to the note title in the file tree. Supports standard URLs and base64-encoded images.

manifest.description: A plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md) that will highlight and focus on the currently selected heading

manifest.description: Sync your Hypothesis highlights
